message:
feat(embedder): Implement Model2Vec potion-retrieval-32M backend

Add Model2Vec embedder implementation for fast static embeddings:
- Create src/model2vec_embedder.rs with full Embedder trait impl
- Use tokenizers crate for subword tokenization
- Use safetensors crate for loading embedding weights
- Implement mean pooling over tokens + L2 normalization
- No ONNX runtime required (pure embedding lookup)

Wire up in model registry:
- Add Model2VecEmbedder import to model_registry.rs
- Update embedder() to instantiate for potion-retrieval-32M
- Update list_models() to check actual availability
- Export module from lib.rs

Closes bd-3ed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -74,6 +74,7 @@ fastembed = { version = "4.9", default-features = false, features = ["ort-downlo
 ort = { version = "2.0.0-rc.9", features = ["download-binaries"] }  # ONNX Runtime for static embedding models
 tokenizers = "0.21"     # HuggingFace tokenizers
 ndarray = "0.16"        # N-dimensional arrays for ONNX tensors
+safetensors = "0.5"     # Read Model2Vec embedding weights from safetensors format
 
 # Parallelism
 rayon = "1.10"
